arts.ttl: Nations League | Italy v France: Match Preview
arts.sum: The UEFA Nations League reaches its group stage climax on Sunday as Italy hosts France at the iconic San Siro in Milan. With both teams already qualified for the quarter-finals, this match will determine who tops Group A2 and secures a potentially more favorable draw in the knockout rounds. Italy currently lead the group with 13 points from 5 matches, while France sit second on 10 points. The Azzurri need only avoid defeat by two or more goals to finish first, while Les Bleus must win by at least two clear goals to leapfrog their rivals into top spot.
